sections.paragraph:
Original: גּפן

Transliteration: gephen

Phonetic: gheh'-fen

BDB Definition:

  1. vine, vine tree
    1. of Israel (figuratively)
    2. of stars fading at Jehovah's judgment (metaphorically)
    3. of prosperity

Origin: from an unused root meaning to bend

TWOT entry: 372a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
